title: Create Theme Park
description: This is a mod like interactive but not the same it's my one one for create fabric 6.0.8.1 because there is no offical version so i coded my own one
body:
This mod is inspired by the Interactive mod, but it is not the same mod and not a copy. It is a completely independent implementation, fully coded by me from scratch. The goal of this project was to recreate similar functionality while improving flexibility and compatibility.

The main reason this mod exists is that there is no official Interactive version available for Create Fabric 6.0.8.1. Because of that, I decided to develop my own solution specifically designed to work with this version of Create Fabric.

This mod adds interactive features that allow players to engage more directly with Create-based components and systems. It is carefully built to integrate smoothly into the Create Fabric environment, while maintaining performance and stability. Every system, behavior, and feature was written by me and adapted to fit the Create Fabric API and mechanics.

Unlike the original Interactive mod, this version follows its own design choices, internal logic, and structure. While the inspiration is clear, the codebase, implementation, and future development direction are entirely original. This also allows me to update, fix, and expand the mod independently without relying on another project.

The mod is intended for players who want a more interactive experience with Create Fabric 6.0.8.1, especially those who were missing similar functionality due to the lack of an official port. It aims to feel natural within the Create ecosystem while still being its own standalone project.

This is an ongoing project, and future updates may include bug fixes, performance improvements, and additional interactive features based on feedback and experimentation.
